name: Utron Ltd
summary: Utron Ltd engages in the planning, development, production, construction, marketing, and maintenance of autonomous parking lots. The company is also involved in the machinery, computing, and integration of computerized logistics systems projects. In addition, it provides U-tron mobile app that enable users to rent a car for parking, as well as reserve and pay for parking, and other activities; automated parking kiosks, including multi-touch parking, graphics standard, and basic textual kiosks; and reception room screen, which provides the queue information comprising estimated arrival times and bay room number for delivery of vehicle with a request made by using the U-tron app or the parking kiosk. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Airport City, Israel.
